strengths: Extensive multi-language backend experience (Node.js, D, Java, C/C++) with event-driven and microservices architectures
Direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and technical leadership in scalable systems (GISCollective, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited explicit fintech or credit-risk experience in resumé, with no mention of regulated financial systems
No direct experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Agentic AI experience appears tangential (focused on tooling rather than production multi-agent systems)
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture skills with hands-on experience in AI-agent tooling, but lacks critical fintech regulatory exposure and high-scale engineering leadership required for this role. His background aligns more closely with general-purpose software engineering than fintech-native AI systems.
